User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /papers/
Allow: /sitemap.xml
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt
Allow: /.well-known/

Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /profile
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /register
Disallow: /notes/
Disallow: /api/

# AI Crawlers: please read our machine-readable product descriptions
# llms.txt (summary): https://ai4papers.com/llms.txt
# llms-full.txt (detailed): https://ai4papers.com/llms-full.txt

# Explicitly allow AI crawlers
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt

Allow: /
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt

Allow: /
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt

Allow: /
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt

Allow: /

Allow: /llms-full.txt

Allow: /

Allow: /
